<output>{
  "themeMovement": [
    { "theme": "wait_time", "delta": 2, "direction": "up" },
    { "theme": "service", "delta": 1, "direction": "up" }
  ],
  "topPatterns": [
    {
      "patternId": "barbershop-walkin-management",
      "title": "Switch walk-ins to a virtual queue for the next two Saturdays",
      "tailoredBody": "Two Reviewers complained about walk-in queues blocking the shop on Saturday. A free virtual-queue app for two Saturdays will tell you whether the underlying issue is throughput or perception.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-bs-1", "starRating": 2, "redactedQuote": "Walk-in queue was out the door on Saturday morning.", "themes": ["wait_time", "service"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "wait-time-staffing-review",
      "title": "Review peak-hour staffing levels against last quarter's rota",
      "tailoredBody": "Three wait-time mentions this week — pull the last quarter's Saturday rota and compare staffing on the floor against what it used to be on equivalent peak Saturdays.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-bs-2", "starRating": 3, "redactedQuote": "Booked appointments running 20 minutes late even though I arrived on time.", "themes": ["wait_time"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "service-recovery-outreach",
      "title": "Run a service-recovery outreach to the week's unhappy Reviewers",
      "tailoredBody": "You have two 1-2 star Reviews this week from booked customers who felt their slot was deprioritised for walk-ins. A short personal apology in the next 24 hours typically halves the risk of escalation.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-bs-1", "starRating": 2, "redactedQuote": "Walk-in queue was out the door on Saturday morning.", "themes": ["wait_time", "service"] }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "overallTone": "concerning"
}</output>
